content:
| event code                            | callback api   | event factor                                                                              |
|:--------------------------------------|:---------------|:------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| CrWarningExt_Unknown                  | OnWarning      | dummy event code                                                                          |
| CrWarningExt_AFStatus                 | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SDIE_AFStatus callback<SDIE_AFStatus>`                                              |
| CrWarningExt_OperationResults         | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SDIE_OperationResults callback<SDIE_OperationResults>`                              |
| CrWarningExt_OperationInvalid         | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SendCommand callback<cb-send-command>`                                              |
| CrWarningExt_ControlPTZFResult        | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`ControlPTZF callback<cb-control-ptzf>`                                              |
| CrWarningExt_PresetPTZFClear          | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`PresetPTZFClear callback<cb-preset-ptzf-clear>`                                     |
| CrWarningExt_PresetPTZFSet            | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`PresetPTZFSet callback<cb-preset-ptzf-set>`                                         |
| CrWarningExt_PresetPTZFEvent          | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SDIE_PresetPTZFEvent callback<SDIE_PresetPTZFEvent>`                                |
| CrWarningExt_RequestTimeZoneSetting   | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`RequestTimeZoneSetting callback<cb-request-timezone-setting>`                       |
| CrWarningExt_SetTimeZoneSetting       | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SetTimeZoneSetting callback<cb-set-timezone-setting>`                               |
| CrWarningExt_ExecuteEframing          | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`ExecuteEframing,UpdateEframingArea callback<cb-Eframing>`                           |
| CrWarningExt_RequestStreamSettingList | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`RequestStreamSettingList callback<cb-request-stream-setting-list>`                  |
| CrWarningExt_SetStreamSettingList     | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`SetStreamSettingList callback<cb-set-stream-setting-list>`                          |
| CrWarningExt_DeleteContent            | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`DeleteRemoteTransferContentsFile callback<cb-delete-remote-transfer-contents-file>` |
| CrWarningExt_UploadSceneFile          | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`UploadSceneFile callback<cb-UploadSceneFile>`                                       |
| CrWarningExt_DownloadSceneFile        | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`DownloadSceneFile callback<cb-downloadscenefile>`                                   |
| CrWarningExt_UploadCustomGridLineFile | OnWarningExt   | :ref:`UploadCustomGridLineFile callback<cb-upload-custom-grid-line-file>`                 |
